tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Maths Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Maths Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Adding two and three gives five. Subtracting four from ten leaves six. Multiplying three by four gives twelve. Dividing twenty by four gives five. This is an even number.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Maths Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Maths Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Half is a fraction. He got ninety percent marks in the exam. Their average height is five feet. A triangle has three sides. All sides of a square are equal.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वृत्त की कोई भुजा नहीं होती।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Dividing twenty by four gives five yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Dividing twenty by four gives five.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Maths Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Maths Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This angle is ninety degrees. The area of the room is twenty square metres. The perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres. Maths is my favourite subject.
